title: Lesser Teleport
description: "I can't make Infinity, Minecraft accel can't be touched!" the humble Lesser Teleport:
body:
An addon for Hex Casting 1.20.1 that adds a pattern (Lesser Teleport) which was originally only in HexKinetics, another addon for Hex Casting but for 1.19.2.  
Lesser Teleport changes an entity's fractional position to a vector.  
Simpler Teleport is also added as something which's page is unlocked after enlightenment, and it's just normal teleportation but with a 10-block limit. If you don't like Simpler Teleport, disable it in the Hex Casting config.
